new_unstarted|epic_meaning.title: Lakho learners ne yahan se start kiya
new_unstarted|epic_meaning.body: Ab aapki baari! {chapter_name} se ek naye mission ka hissa bano.

new_unstarted|epic_meaning.title: Career transform hota hai yahan!
new_unstarted|epic_meaning.body: 10 lakh+ professionals ne SpeakX se English seekhi. Aapki journey {chapter_name} se shuru hoti hai!

new_unstarted|epic_meaning.title: Something bigger awaits
new_unstarted|epic_meaning.body: Ye sirf app nahi -- ye ek community hai. {character_name} ke saath shuru karo!

new_unstarted|unpredictability.title: Ek surprise aapka wait kar raha hai!

new_unstarted|unpredictability.title: Guess karo kya milega?
new_unstarted|unpredictability.body: Pehli lesson complete karo aur mystery reward unlock karo! {engagement_hook}
